chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Constitutional Petition No.S-311 of 2025 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Petitioner: Ghulam Muhammad Jarwar s/o Imam Bux Jarwar through Mr.Nihal Khan Lashari, Advocate Respondent No.1: Mst.Samina d/o Abdul Rauf. Nemo. Respondent No.2: 2nd Additional District Judge, Tando Allahyar.Nemo. Respondent No.3: Family Judge/Consumer Judge, Tando Allahyar Nemo. Date of hearing: 23.10.2025 Date of decision: 11.11.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled petition is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
